newsText: Apple today announced its next generation of iPhone devices featuring advanced generative AI features integrated directly into iOS. Pre-order demand has reached record-breaking highs, causing several Wall Street firms to raise their price targets for AAPL, citing an upcoming robust supercycle.

Regulators have launched an official safety probe into Tesla's advanced driver-assistance software following reports of sudden deceleration on highways. Analysts warn that safety reviews could lead to costly mandatory hardware updates and slow down autonomous driving deliveries.

Pharmaceutical giant Pfizer announced positive Phase 3 clinical trial results for its new breast cancer treatment, showing a 40% reduction in disease progression risk. Healthcare stocks rallied strongly, boosting the broader market indices.
